name: TriviaGame
short: Trivia game (command: quiz) with its own question DB and a leaderboard.
description: A trivia/quiz game with a per-guild question database (managed from the web dashboard), points and a leaderboard. Uses the 'quiz' command to avoid clashing with Red's core Trivia. Opt-in per guild, bilingual (DE/EN).
author: Domekologe
install_msg:
Thanks for installing TriviaGame!

Load it with `[p]load triviagame`, then configure it via its commands or the PDC web dashboard (if installed).
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores the Discord user IDs and scores of players on its per-server leaderboard, plus the server's question set. Leaderboard data can be reset by a server admin.
